name: should create a query for season projected stats - split
description: Test case for should create a query for season projected stats - split
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2020,2021,2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('RB')), "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e" as materialized (select COALESCE(bc_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", SUM(CASE WHEN bc_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rush_atts_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023) group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(bc_pid)) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."ra" AS "season_projected_rush_atts_0", "tfc6446490634e3c25d2dc57723db129c"."ry" AS "season_projected_rush_yds_0", "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e"."rush_atts_from_plays" AS "rush_atts_from_plays_0", "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "projections_index" as "tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a" on "tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."pid" = "player"."pid" and tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a.year = player_years.year and tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a.year IN (2023,2022,2021,2020) and "tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."week" = '0' and "tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."sourceid" = 18 and "tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."seas_type" = 'REG' left join "projections_index" as "tfc6446490634e3c25d2dc57723db129c" on "tfc6446490634e3c25d2dc57723db129c"."pid" = "player"."pid" and tfc6446490634e3c25d2dc57723db129c.year = player_years.year and "tfc6446490634e3c25d2dc57723db129c"."week" = '0' and "tfc6446490634e3c25d2dc57723db129c"."sourceid" = 18 and "tfc6446490634e3c25d2dc57723db129c"."seas_type" = 'REG' left join "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e" on "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e.year = player_years.year where player.pos IN ('RB') group by player.fname, player.lname, "tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."ra", "tfc6446490634e3c25d2dc57723db129c"."ry", "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e"."rush_atts_from_plays", "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
